title: taraxacum rubellum
intro: Taraxacum rubellum, also known as the yellow dandelion or red dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The plant has various health benefits, such as supporting liver function, improving digestion, and acting as a diuretic, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum rubellum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like fever, skin issues, and respiratory problems.
